jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at DTDC
jsonLd.description:
DTDC invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
